title: Piston Push
description: minecraft mod that allow you to change max value that a piston can push
body:
## Base This mod add a new gamerule to minecraft. It allow you to change te maximum block that a piston can push.
## How it works? The default value fixed by is 12 blocks and can be change with the following command : `/gamerule PistonPushingLimit `. - The value must be between 0 and 512. 0 means that pistons can't push anything. - High values can cause some visual glitchs but doesn't cause any others problems. I know that a similar mod exist but since that it didn't got any updates for years, I decided to create my own ## Issues This mod doesn't change anything when using carpet mod. If you encounter any issues, report it on github or on discord.
